browser: playwright-edge (fallback from playwright-firefox — Firefox MCP session failed; playwright-chrome had admin SPA interference)
browserFallbackChain: playwright-firefox FAILED (session closed) -> playwright-chrome FAILED (admin SPA hijacking) -> playwright-edge OK
testDataNotes: Bike with options product has different prices from CSV test data: Seat=$45 (not $15), Pedals=$0 (not $14), Rear wheel=$22x2=$44 (not $88x2=$176), no Engine option. Base price $350 matches. Per feedback_env_resilience.md, exact prices are env-dependent. Tests adapted to actual values.

vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-020-COND: PASS — Frame Type expanded with Aluminum preselected ($0); price=$300.00; Wheel Set+Frame Color visible (both depend on Frame Type which has value); Tire Type NOT in DOM (depends on Wheel Set which has no value)
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-021-COND: PASS — After selecting Standard ($25) in Wheel Set: Tire Type section appeared in DOM with 4 radio options (Slick $20, Knobby $35, None $0, None); price updated to $325.00
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-022-COND: PASS — After clicking None in Wheel Set: Tire Type removed from DOM (0 radios, not in innerText); price returned to $300.00
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-023-COND: PASS — After hide/show cycle (Standard->Slick->None->Standard): Tire Type reset to None (Slick cleared by clearHiddenSectionValues); no stale state carried over
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-024-COND: PASS — With Standard+Slick: price=$345.00 ($300+$0+$25+$20). After deselecting Wheel Set: price=$300.00 (hidden Slick price excluded from total)
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-025-COND: PASS — Transitive chain A->B->C verified: Tire Type only appears when Wheel Set has value; Wheel Set appears when Frame Type has value; deselecting Wheel Set hides Tire Type transitively
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-026-COND: PASS — Add to cart succeeded with Tire Type hidden (Wheel Set=None). lineItemId appeared in URL; no validation error for hidden section
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-027-COND: PASS — Both Wheel Set and Frame Color visible simultaneously when Frame Type=Aluminum (both depend on same parent). No partial show/hide
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-028-COND: SKIPPED — Requires separate add-to-cart with visible conditional section; partially covered by 026-COND flow
vcst4713ConditionalResults.CFG-PDP-029-COND: PASS — Cart did NOT include Tire Type or Slick after add with hidden section. Subtotal=$300.00 (no hidden prices). Cart text confirmed: no 'Slick' or 'Tire Type' present

executedCases.title: Configurable Product PDP Renders Configuration Widget Correctly
executedCases.notes: Product name 'Bike with options' in h1. Base price $350.00. Configure the parameters widget visible. 5 accordion sections (Text, Section with products, Section with text, Variation, Test). Text section expanded by default with None selected. Add to cart button visible. No lineItemId in URL. Breadcrumbs correct. NOTE: Test data references 'Select one' with 5 radio options — actual product has 5 section types instead. SKU is ZER-64605169 not CVQ-54616437.

executedCases.title: Selecting Radio Option Updates Total Price Immediately
executedCases.notes: None=$350, Seat=$395 ($350+$45), Rear wheel=$394 ($350+$22x2), Pedals=$350 ($350+$0). All prices update immediately without page reload. NOTE: actual prices differ from test data but math is correct.

executedCases.title: Each Option Row Displays Unit Price Quantity and Extended Price
executedCases.notes: Seat: $45/$45 (unit/extended). Rear wheel: $22/$44 (unit x qty=2). Pedals: $0/$0. None: no price. Extended=unit*qty verified.

executedCases.title: Sale Price Shown as Primary Price with List Price Strikethrough
executedCases.notes: Rear wheel shows $22/$44 but no strikethrough list price observed in current data. Product pricing may not have separate sale/list prices currently.

executedCases.title: Configurable Product Uses Dedicated Add to Cart Button (No Quantity Stepper)
executedCases.notes: Single Add to cart button visible (no quantity stepper). After add: button changed to 'Update cart'. lineItemId in URL. CountInCart badge='1'. Cart badge shows '1Cart'.

executedCases.title: Add Configured Product to Cart with Option Selected (Happy Path)
executedCases.notes: Seat selected ($395). Add to cart clicked. lineItemId in URL. Button changed to Update cart. Cart badge updated to 1.

executedCases.title: Add Configured Product to Cart with None Selected (Optional Section)
executedCases.notes: Not explicitly tested with None+add flow due to browser session constraints. Covered implicitly by VCST-4713 conditional tests (026-COND).

executedCases.title: Accordion Expands and Collapses Correctly
executedCases.notes: Section with products accordion expanded and collapsed correctly via click. Options hidden when collapsed, visible when expanded.

executedCases.title: Accordion Subtitle Updates to Show Selected Option Name
executedCases.notes: Not directly verified subtitle text changes due to browser session constraints. Would require checking subtitle text after each radio selection.

executedCases.title: No Auto-Scroll on Radio Button Click (VCST-4612 Regression)
executedCases.notes: Scroll position verification requires scrollY comparison before/after radio clicks. Not tested due to session instability.

executedCases.title: Cart Shows Configured Product with Option Details and Correct Prices
executedCases.notes: Cart shows 'Bike with options' at $394.00 (Rear wheel). 'Components list' link available for configuration details. Subtotal=$394.00.

executedCases.title: Checkout Completes Successfully with Configured Product
executedCases.notes: Full checkout flow not executed — requires address selection, shipping, payment. Beyond scope of browser session time.

executedCases.title: Order History Displays Configured Product with Option Details
executedCases.notes: Depends on CFG-PDP-012 checkout completion.

executedCases.title: Price Calculation Accuracy for All Five Option Combinations
executedCases.notes: All option prices verified: None=$350, Seat=$395, Rear wheel=$394, Pedals=$350. Only 3 product options + None (no Engine). Math correct for all.

executedCases.title: Out-of-Stock Option Indicated and Non-Selectable
executedCases.notes: No out-of-stock option identified in current Bike product configuration.

executedCases.title: Create New Configuration Link — Visibility and Reset Behavior (VCST-3902)
executedCases.notes: After add-to-cart: Create new configuration link visible. Clicking it: lineItemId removed, config reset to defaults, button reverts to Add to cart, link disappears.

executedCases.title: Customers Bought Together Section — Renders Below Configuration Widget

Partially covered by 026-COND flow

blockers.issue: playwright-firefox MCP session failed to initialize (Target page, context or browser has been closed)
blockers.impact: Had to fall back to playwright-edge. No Firefox-specific testing performed.
blockers.mitigation: All tests executed on Edge instead. Firefox cross-browser coverage gap.

blockers.issue: playwright-chrome admin SPA hijacking — shared browser session causes admin panel to intercept storefront navigation
blockers.impact: Chrome browser unusable for storefront testing when admin panel was previously visited in same session
blockers.mitigation: Fell back to playwright-edge which had clean session

testDataDiscrepancies: SKU: test expects CVQ-54616437, actual ZER-64605169
Section structure: test expects single 'Select one' with 5 radio options; actual has 5 separate section types (Text, Section with products, Section with text, Variation, Test)
Options: test expects Seat=$15, Pedals=$14, Engine=$225, Rear wheel=$88; actual Seat=$45, Pedals=$0, Rear wheel=$22, no Engine
CFG-022 (conditional) test data matches: Frame Type options (Aluminum $0, Steel $50, Carbon $200), Wheel Set (Standard $25, Sport $75), Tire Type (Slick $20, Knobby $35)
consoleErrors: No JavaScript errors detected on PDP or cart pages
